grant_title: Grants for After School Programs in New Jersey
geographic_restrictions: Primarily New Jersey, with some national grants applicable to NJ-based applicants
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements mentioned; focuses on general after-school program support.
eligibility_summary: Open to nonprofit organizations, schools, and community organizations operating after-school programs in New Jersey. Some grants may have additional eligibility criteria such as 501(c)(3) status or geographic service areas.
